channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.24 (Build 20260623)
item.description:
What's New

feat(engine): support Central Highlands place names with final 'k'

Ethnic-minority place names (Đắk Lắk, Krông Búk, M'Đrắk) use 'k' as a final

consonant and the "kr" onset, neither standard Vietnamese phonology. Typing

"ddawks" in Telex produced "đăks" because the sắc tone could not be placed

after the non-standard final 'k'.

  • VietnameseData: add literal final 'k' to endConsonantTable; add the

[KEYA,KEYK] / [KEYU,KEYK] mark-placement entries so a tone typed after

'k' finds its vowel; add the [KEYK,KEYR] initial cluster (Krông).

  • VNEngine: restrict stop-final 'k' to sắc/nặng (handleMarkKey + checkSpelling)

and reject a circumflex vowel before 'k' (foreign words like network/book).

  • VNEngineEnglishDetection: allow the "kr" onset (drop it from the impossible

prefixes) for Krông.

Tested in VNEngineTests (Telex + VNI, uppercase, multi-word, adjacent

Vietnamese words, English collision cases). Full XKeyTests: 510/510 passing.

Bump build version to 20260623.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
